design_read: Live review operations workbench for content/ecommerce operators, with restrained DataHub enterprise-console language, optimized for closing livestream evidence gaps.

state_checks.authenticated_route: Verified: final URL stayed on /content/live-center with h1 present and no login redirect.
state_checks.selected_session: Verified: one selected table row was present.
state_checks.focus_visible: Verified on desktop: selected row received a 2px brand-blue outline when focused.
state_checks.horizontal_overflow: Verified: no page-level horizontal overflow on desktop or mobile; table uses contained horizontal scrolling.

required_findings: Desktop already has a credible two-column operational workbench with selected-state and focus evidence.
Mobile first viewport buries the session queue: workbench starts at y=1008 below the 844px viewport.
Header, command cards, and filters take too much mobile vertical priority before the primary session queue.
The detail overview presents readiness after metrics and metadata, so next action is diluted.
Converted rows and selected rows both lean on brand blue, weakening selected-state semantics.
false_positive_guards: Do not score this above 88 because mobile task priority is not resilient before the change.
Do not claim upload, empty, error, or active AI-running states were exhaustively verified.
Do not treat table-internal horizontal scroll as page-level overflow.
